requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Protection — NFPA 855 as the Required Installation Standard versus China's GB 50016 Fire Code
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防保护——NFPA 855作为所需安装标准与中国GB 50016消防规范的对比
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防保護——NFPA 855作為所需安裝標準與中國GB 50016消防規範的對比

summary.en: Lesotho's fire safety regulatory framework is administered by the Lesotho Mounted Police Service Fire Arm — the national fire authority responsible for fire-safety approvals for commercial and industrial installations including BESS. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant fire-safety installation code for stationary BESS and is widely applied in projects across sub-Saharan Africa where BESS fire-safety requirements are specified. NFPA 855 requirements cover thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection and ventilation design, fire suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances between ESS units. Given Lesotho's adoption of international technical frameworks, project owners, EPCs, and funders (including development finance institutions active in Lesotho's energy sector) typically reference NFPA 855 in BESS project specifications. Formal adoption of NFPA 855 by Lesotho's fire authority as the mandatory standard for stationary BESS had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this requires direct verification with the Lesotho fire authority and the project owner before project design is finalised.
summary.zh: 莱索托消防安全监管框架由莱索托皇家警察部队消防部门负责——这是负责包括BESS在内的商业和工业装置消防安全审批的国家消防主管机关。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是固定式BESS在国际上占主导地位的消防安全安装规范，在撒哈拉以南非洲规定BESS消防安全要求的项目中被广泛应用。NFPA 855要求涵盖热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测和通风设计、消防抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及储能系统单元间隔离距离。鉴于莱索托采用国际技术框架，项目业主、EPC承包商和资助方（包括在莱索托能源行业活跃的发展融资机构）通常在BESS项目规格中引用NFPA 855。截至本数据集日期，莱索托消防主管机关正式采纳NFPA 855作为固定式BESS强制标准尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；需在项目设计最终确定前直接向莱索托消防主管机关和项目业主核实。
summary.zht: 賴索托消防安全監管框架由賴索托皇家警察部隊消防部門負責——這是負責包括BESS在內的商業和工業裝置消防安全審批的國家消防主管機關。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是固定式BESS在國際上佔主導地位的消防安全安裝規範，在撒哈拉以南非洲規定BESS消防安全要求的項目中被廣泛應用。NFPA 855要求涵蓋熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測和通風設計、消防抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及儲能系統單元間隔離距離。鑑於賴索托採用國際技術框架，項目業主、EPC承包商和資助方（包括在賴索托能源行業活躍的發展融資機構）通常在BESS項目規格中引用NFPA 855。截至本數據集日期，賴索托消防主管機關正式採納NFPA 855作為固定式BESS強制標準尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；需在項目設計最終確定前直接向賴索托消防主管機關和項目業主核實。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal Lesotho fire authority adoption for stationary BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with the Lesotho fire authority)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (widely referenced for fire suppression system design in Lesotho commercial and industrial projects)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (referenced for fire detection and alarm systems)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard for BESS)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under GB 50016-2014 (2018 edition) (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings) as the primary building and installation fire code, supplemented by GB 44240-2024 (which includes cell-level fire-safety provisions) and GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (which include system-level fire-related safety requirements). Project-level fire-safety review in China is conducted by local fire authorities under the Ministry of Emergency Management. China's fire-safety framework for BESS differs substantially from NFPA 855 in structure, scope, and specific technical requirements — particularly thermal-runaway propagation control, suppression system design criteria, and separation distance specifications. Chinese GB fire-safety standards and domestic approval documentation are not recognised by Lesotho fire authorities or BESS project owners in Lesotho as equivalent to NFPA 855 compliance. BESS fire-safety design prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned documentation for Lesotho project fire-safety approvals.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 50016-2014（2018年版）（建筑设计防火规范）作为主要建筑和安装消防规范管理BESS消防安全，并辅以GB 44240-2024（包含电芯级消防安全规定）、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（包含系统级消防相关安全要求）。中国的项目级消防审查由应急管理部下属地方消防主管机关进行。中国BESS消防安全框架与NFPA 855在结构、范围和具体技术要求方面存在实质性差异——尤其是热失控蔓延控制、抑制系统设计标准和隔离距离规定。中国GB消防安全标准和国内审批文件不被莱索托消防主管机关或莱索托BESS项目业主认可为等同于NFPA 855合规。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全设计须在莱索托项目消防安全审批中补充符合NFPA 855要求的文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 50016-2014（2018年版）（建築設計防火規範）作為主要建築和安裝消防規範管理BESS消防安全，並輔以GB 44240-2024（包含電芯級消防安全規定）、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（包含系統級消防相關安全要求）。中國的項目級消防審查由應急管理部下屬地方消防主管機關進行。中國BESS消防安全框架與NFPA 855在結構、範圍和具體技術要求方面存在實質性差異——尤其是熱失控蔓延控制、抑制系統設計標準和隔離距離規定。中國GB消防安全標準和國內審批文件不被賴索托消防主管機關或賴索托BESS項目業主認可為等同於NFPA 855合規。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全設計須在賴索托項目消防安全審批中補充符合NFPA 855要求的文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 50016-2014 (2018 edition) — 建筑设计防火规范 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings; China's primary building fire code applicable to BESS installations)
GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes cell-level fire-safety provisions; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire-safety requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Lesotho BESS project specifications and fire-safety approvals reference NFPA 855 as the applicable installation standard. China's fire-safety framework for BESS (GB 50016, GB 44240-2024, and GB/T 36558-2023) differs substantially from NFPA 855 in technical scope and specific requirements. Chinese fire-safety documentation alone does not satisfy Lesotho project fire-safety requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Lesotho fire authority whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the mandatory standard for BESS installations and determine any Lesotho-specific additional requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855, including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation analysis, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design (NFPA 13), emergency shutdown procedures, and minimum separation distances between ESS units; (c) confirm whether fire-suppression equipment must be listed or approved by an internationally recognised testing laboratory (UL, FM Global, or equivalent); (d) engage a fire protection engineer familiar with NFPA 855 and Lesotho fire authority procedures for design review and approval submission before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：莱索托BESS项目规格和消防安全审批引用NFPA 855作为适用安装标准。中国BESS消防安全框架（GB 50016、GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36558-2023）与NFPA 855在技术范围和具体要求方面存在实质性差异。仅凭中国消防安全文件不能满足莱索托项目消防安全要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向莱索托消防主管机关确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为BESS安装的强制标准，并确定任何莱索托专项额外要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件，包括热失控蔓延缓解分析、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计（NFPA 13）、紧急停机程序及储能系统单元间最小隔离距离；（c）确认消防抑制设备是否须经国际认可测试实验室（UL、FM Global或同等机构）认证；（d）在项目调试前聘请熟悉NFPA 855和莱索托消防主管机关程序的消防工程师进行设计审查和批准申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：賴索托BESS項目規格和消防安全審批引用NFPA 855作為適用安裝標準。中國BESS消防安全框架（GB 50016、GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36558-2023）與NFPA 855在技術範圍和具體要求方面存在實質性差異。僅憑中國消防安全文件不能滿足賴索托項目消防安全要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向賴索托消防主管機關確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為BESS安裝的強制標準，並確定任何賴索托專項額外要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件，包括熱失控蔓延緩解分析、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計（NFPA 13）、緊急停機程序及儲能系統單元間最小隔離距離；（c）確認消防抑制設備是否須經國際認可測試實驗室（UL、FM Global或同等機構）認證；（d）在項目調試前聘請熟悉NFPA 855和賴索托消防主管機關程序的消防工程師進行設計審查和批准申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — fire-safety installation approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Lesotho; NFPA 855 is the internationally expected standard referenced in project specifications; formal Lesotho fire authority adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for BESS has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with the Lesotho fire authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Ministry of Emergency Management

source.publisher: NFPA — National Fire Protection Association (publisher of NFPA 855)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 50016 fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Lesotho BESS project fire-safety requirements. NFPA 855 is the internationally expected installation standard referenced in Lesotho BESS project specifications. Engage the Lesotho fire authority and a fire protection engineer familiar with NFPA 855 at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code and approval process. Prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855, including thermal-runaway propagation control, suppression system design, gas detection and ventilation, and emergency shutdown procedures.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 50016消防安全文件不满足莱索托BESS项目消防安全要求。NFPA 855是莱索托BESS项目规格中引用的国际预期安装标准。应在项目最早阶段与莱索托消防主管机关及熟悉NFPA 855的消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范和审批流程。准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件，包括热失控蔓延控制、抑制系统设计、气体探测和通风及紧急停机程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 50016消防安全文件不滿足賴索托BESS項目消防安全要求。NFPA 855是賴索托BESS項目規格中引用的國際預期安裝標準。應在項目最早階段與賴索托消防主管機關及熟悉NFPA 855的消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範和審批流程。準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件，包括熱失控蔓延控制、抑制系統設計、氣體探測和通風及緊急停機程序。
